ddls:
CREATE TABLE "feedback_submissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback submission */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the feedback was submitted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback submission */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the feedback submission */,
  "preference" TEXT /* Preferred method of notification for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the feedback (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response from city officials regarding the feedback */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_submissions_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES feedback_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_submissions_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area covered by the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Approximate population of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission being responded to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the response */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response from the user */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the resolution */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES feedback_submissions ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the status means */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback submission related to the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., created, updated, responded) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the action */,
  "action_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments related to the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES feedback_submissions ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback submission related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES feedback_submissions ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., resident, city official) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
